# [PATCH 03/11] cygwin-htdocs: website fresh coat of paint

| Header | Value |
|--------|-------|
| **From** | John Haugabook <johnhaugabook@gmail.com> |
| **To** | cygwin-patches@cygwin.com |
| **Date** | 2026-04-19T01:26:51-04:00 |
| **Message-ID** | [20260419052701.513-4-johnhaugabook@gmail.com](https://inbox.sourceware.org/cygwin-patches/20260419052701.513-4-johnhaugabook@gmail.com) |

---

**Thread**: [thread](05-26-48.thread.md#:~:text=2026/04/19/05-26-51)

add logo to top.html

Signed-off-by: John Haugabook <johnhaugabook@gmail.com>
---
```
 logo.svg  | 16 ++++++++++++++++
 style.css | 21 +++++++++++++++++++--
 top.html  |  3 +++
 3 files changed, 38 insertions(+), 2 deletions(-)
 create mode 100644 logo.svg

```

```diff
diff --git a/logo.svg b/logo.svg
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..a953b1ea
--- /dev/null
+++ b/logo.svg
@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
+<svg id="logo"
+  xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
+  xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" viewBox="0 0 143.97 148.22">
+  <!-- inner green arrow within bowl of beveled c, with 3d bevel effect -->
+  <g id="green-arrow" class="cls-2">
+    <!-- green background with 3d bevel effect generated -->
+    <image width="512" height="262" transform="translate(46.34 49.55) scale(.19)" xlink:href="data:image/png;base64,"/>
+  </g>
+
+  <!-- Black squarish C, triangular points, 3d bevel effect -->
+  <g id="C-bevel-fill" class="cls-2">
+    <!-- dark c background with 3d bevel effect generated -->
+    <image width="498" height="512" transform="translate(4.91 5.11) scale(.27)" xlink:href="data:image/png;base64,"/>
+  </g>
+</svg>
```

\ No newline at end of file
```diff
diff --git a/style.css b/style.css
index 5e815292..4a31a9a0 100644
--- a/style.css
+++ b/style.css
@@ -72,10 +72,27 @@ color:gold;
   padding-left: 0.75em;
 }
 
-/* ----------------------------------------------------------------------- */
+/* top related ----------------------------------------------------------- */
 
-#top
+div.logo img
 {
+  display: inline-block;
+  position: absolute;
+  height: 70px;
+  top: 4px;
+  left: 10px;
+}
+
+/* Add hover effect */
+div.logo:hover
+{
+  opacity: 0.85;
+}
+
+/* move div.cartouche to accomodate logo using absolute positioning */
+div#top div.cartouche
+{
+  padding-left: 80px;
 }
 
 /* Two-column what is/isn't it layout ------------------------------------ */
diff --git a/top.html b/top.html
index 8d31a56d..08543164 100644
--- a/top.html
+++ b/top.html
@@ -1,4 +1,7 @@
 <div id="top">
+  <div class="logo">
+   <a href="/index.html"><img src="/logo.svg"></a>
+  </div>
   <div class="cartouche">
    <h1 id="big-title">Cygwin</h1>
    <p class="catchphrase">Get that <a href="https://www.linuxfoundation.org/">Linux</a> feeling - on Windows</p>
-- 
```

2.46.0.windows.1
